headline: Asia-Pacific markets mostly rise in Easter trade on hopes for Hormuz reopening
summary: South Korea's Kospi led gains in the region while Japan's Nikkei 225 also opened higher. The Australian and Hong Kong markets were closed for the Easter weekend.

headline: UBS Maintains Buy on Phillips 66, Raises Price Target to $212
summary: UBS  analyst Manav Gupta   maintains Phillips 66 (NYSE:PSX) with a Buy and raises the price target from $172 to $212.
